examples: Theoretically, the price is supposed to be marked on the shelf.
Theoretically, such equipment could help paraplegics regain movement.
Theoretically, in the world of trade, shipping costs do not matter.
Theoretically at least, Bon Jovi needs Jon Bon Jovi more than it needs Richie Sambora.
If you believe that (and it is theoretically true), the converse should also make sense, right?
